facts.title: Bootstrapper INFINITE-wait rewrite
facts.body: src/MasterControlBootstrapper/main.cpp:644 (runProcess) and :707 (runProcessCapture) use WaitForSingleObject(..., INFINITE). The right fix is the concurrent-drain pattern at MasterControlRuntime.cpp:1059. FORBIDDEN-CONTRACT 6.4 documents the exemption.

facts.title: Auto-fail-leases-on-failed-instance sweeper
facts.body: Periodic timer that walks IWorkerSupervisor::listPools() + ILeaseRouter::activeLeases() and transitions leases bound to Failed instances to LeaseState::Failed. Pairs with heartbeat-decay-to-Stale presence transitions.

facts.title: PDH/DXGI host telemetry enrichment
facts.body: ITelemetryAggregator surface is ready; the actual PDH-driven CPU/disk/network counters and DXGI GPU memory readings are not yet wired. Additive change behind an IHostTelemetryProbe.

facts.title: Browser-side test harness (formatMetric unit + Playwright)
facts.body: No JS test harness in the repo. PHASE-10 release gate concern. formatMetric is the highest-value unit.

facts.title: WinUI shell realignment
facts.body: src/MasterControlShell/ builds clean (1 pre-existing C4100) but is not wired to any gateway-first panel. Decide whether to delete or rebuild around the new model.

facts.title: Install-use-uninstall round-trip on clean VM
facts.body: Gold-standard installer smoke. Needs Windows Sandbox / fresh-VM runner with admin privileges.

facts.title: MCPJungle end-to-end gateway exercise
facts.body: Real MCPJungle binary integration test. Operator-installed per ADR-002 §11; supervised-mock fallback handles its absence honestly.

facts.title: Pool CRUD UI in dashboard
facts.body: Pools panel exposes scale-to-min and drain inline; full create/edit/remove via UI lands when explicitly scoped.

facts.title: SSE / WebSocket push for telemetry events stream
facts.body: Currently 5s polling. Optimization, not a regression.
tags: seed:deferred:SSE / WebSocket push for telemetry events stream

facts.title: README full-badge expansion (or sync script simplification)
facts.body: Sync-RepositoryVersionBadges.ps1 expects 5 chained badges + a 'Current release' block. README has 1 badge. PHASE-10 hand-patched the visible badge.
tags: seed:deferred:README full-badge expansion (or sync script simplification)

facts.title: ADR-002 §1 — no provider-era execution
facts.body: MCOS does not execute ChatGPT/Codex/Claude/Grok directly. Provider names persist only as client profile types.

facts.title: ADR-002 §1 — LAN AI-client surface is auth=none / trust=lan
facts.body: Trust enforced at the network/firewall layer, not the application layer. Operator surface is logically separate.
tags: seed:invariant:ADR-002 §1 — LAN AI-client surface is au

facts.title: ADR-002 §3 — gateway-first topology
facts.body: AI client -> MCOS advertised MCP Gateway -> MCPJungle -> MCOS logical pool -> LeaseRouter -> backend instance. Autoscaled clones NOT exposed as separate public tools.

facts.title: ADR-002 §8 — sticky-session integrity (no hot-migration)
facts.body: LeaseRouter step 1 returns active lease verbatim, never re-binding to a different instance. FORBIDDEN-CONTRACT §2.4 enforces.

facts.title: ADR-002 §9 — honest telemetry (-1.0 = unavailable)
facts.body: ClientHeartbeat / WorkerTelemetry use -1.0 as the unavailable sentinel. 0.0 is genuine 'idle'. HostTelemetrySnapshot is exempt (PDH-direct). FORBIDDEN-CONTRACT §4.3 + §8.1 enforce.

facts.title: ADR-002 §10 — release gate, no workflow_dispatch bypass
facts.body: windows-build-test-package.yml + release.yml are the gating pair. Neither has workflow_dispatch. FORBIDDEN-CONTRACT §6.2 enforces.

facts.title: ADR-002 §11 — Forsetti vendoring is sealed
facts.body: No edits inside Forsetti-Framework-Windows-main/. FORBIDDEN-CONTRACT §5.1 + the Forsetti compliance script enforce.

facts.title: Group 1 — Provider-era execution forbidden
facts.body: ADR-001 §1 + ADR-002 §1. Sections 1.1-1.7 in FORBIDDEN-CONTRACT-GREP-LIST.md. Includes provider modules, services, transports, routes, data types, governance kinds.

facts.title: Group 2 — Gateway abstraction integrity
facts.body: ADR-002 §2,§3. No direct MCPJungle coupling outside the adapter; no autoscaled-clone registration as separate tools; no hot-migration; sticky-session integrity (§2.4); worker process tree containment (§2.1a).

facts.title: Group 3 — Trust model integrity
facts.body: ADR-002 §1. No app-layer auth on AI-client gateway; no bearer/session token requirements; operator-surface auth must not regress to 'anyone can mutate'.

facts.title: Group 4 — Telemetry honesty
facts.body: ADR-002 §9. No fake telemetry (§4.1); per-client metrics only via heartbeat/sidecar (§4.2); ClientHeartbeat -1.0 sentinel integrity (§4.3); event ring cap stays at 1024 (§4.4); recordHeartbeat is the only client-metric write site (§4.5).

facts.title: Group 5 — Forsetti vendoring sealed
facts.body: ADR-002 §11. git diff Forsetti-Framework-Windows-main/ since baseline must be empty.

facts.title: Group 6 — CI / release gate integrity
facts.body: ADR-002 §10. No hardcoded VS Enterprise path (§6.1); no workflow_dispatch on gating workflows (§6.2); no path-segment Enterprise in workflows (§6.3); process execution 7-step compliance with documented bootstrapper exemptions (§6.4); version-stamp before configure (§6.5).

facts.title: Group 7 — Phase scope integrity
facts.body: manifest.json. PHASE-00 must not edit code (§7.1); PHASE-XX must not edit files outside its scope (§7.2 — manual review).

facts.title: Group 8 — Dashboard honesty
facts.body: ADR-002 §9, PHASE-09. Dashboard must render -1.0 as 'unavailable' (§8.1); no legacy hardcoded surface IDs (§8.2); no provider-era residue in app.js (§8.3); no removed-route fetches (§8.4).

facts.title: ADR-003: keep MCPJungle for v0.6.x
facts.body: PHASE-11 decision: keep MCPJungle as the v0.6.x default gateway substrate behind the existing IMcpGateway adapter. Native HTTP.sys gateway is documented as a conditional future phase (proposed PHASE-12). The adapter abstraction makes the choice reversible. Source-tree unchanged.

facts.title: PHASE-12 native HTTP.sys gateway (conditional)
facts.body: Native gateway implementation deferred per ADR-003. Activates only when one of five triggers is observed: (1) measured throughput cap with operational impact, (2) confirmed session-affinity break under load, (3) MCPJungle release-cadence stall, (4) operator-experience friction blocking adoption, (5) vendoring policy change. Migration plan documented in docs/implementation/PHASE-11-NATIVE-GATEWAY-EVALUATION.md Â§3. Effort estimate 7-18 weeks. Requirements documented in Â§2. Native must implement IMcpGateway exactly; McpJungleGatewayAdapter stays as in-tree fallback even post-migration.

facts.title: ADR-003 Â§triggers: PHASE-12 activation conditions
facts.body: PHASE-12 (native HTTP.sys gateway) activates if and only if one or more of: (1) MCPJungle saturates below required p95 under real LAN AI-client load, (2) PHASE-07 sticky-session contract observably violated by MCPJungle routing, (3) MCPJungle does not track an MCP spec version we need to ship, (4) operators consistently fail to install MCPJungle alongside MCOS, (5) ADR-002 Â§11 vendoring policy changes. PHASE-08 telemetry surface is the right monitoring tool for triggers 1 and 2; 3 and 4 are organizational signals. Recall this fact at the start of any future operations review.

facts.title: PHASE-11 complete: realignment program done (PHASE-00..PHASE-11)
facts.body: PHASE-11 was the last phase in the realignment manifest. All 12 phases (PHASE-00..PHASE-11) are complete. Subsequent work is conditional (PHASE-12 if triggers fire), deferred maintenance (consolidated under tags=[deferred]), or out-of-scope operations/feature work. Product is releasable per the PHASE-10 gate.

PHASE-00.notes: Repository baseline + ADR-002 + drift inventory + removal map + grep list. Docs only.

PHASE-01.notes: Provider-era removal already mostly done (ADR-001); only WinUI shell had residual references. ~1100 lines net deletion.

PHASE-02.notes: IMcpGateway + McpJungleGatewayAdapter + supervised-mock fallback. Gateway HTTP routes.

PHASE-03.notes: DNS-SD service registration + /.well-known/mcos.json + /api/discovery + UDP beacon + AppConfiguration.instanceId.

PHASE-05.notes: GovernanceBundleService + bundle distribution routes + bcrypt link + Forsetti compliance script update (6 stale assertions retired).

PHASE-06.notes: WorkerSupervisor + Job Object containment + 7-state lifecycle + pool admin routes. (std::max) parenthesization needed for Windows.h max() macro.

PHASE-07.notes: ILeaseRouter + sticky-session for stateful + least-loaded for stateless + same-type scale-out. (std::numeric_limits<int>::max)() parenthesization.

PHASE-08.notes: ITelemetryAggregator + ClientHeartbeat with -1.0 unavailable sentinel + 1024-event ring + 4 telemetry routes. (std::min) parenthesization for Windows.h min() macro.

PHASE-09.notes: Tron dashboard realigned to gateway-first. 11 destinations. formatMetric() honesty helper. DASHBOARD-ROUTE-MAP.md created.

PHASE-10.notes: Windows release gate closed. release.yml verifies same-SHA windows-build-test-package run before publishing. VERSION.json bumped 0.5.0 -> 0.6.0.

PHASE-11.notes: Decision: keep MCPJungle for v0.6.x. Native HTTP.sys gateway deferred to conditional PHASE-12 gated on five triggers (throughput cap, session-affinity break, upstream stall, operator-install friction, vendoring policy change). ADR-003 records the decision. PHASE-11-NATIVE-GATEWAY-EVALUATION.md carries the matrix + requirements + migration plan + limitations.

src/MasterControlApp/MasterControlRuntim.note: Windows.h max()/min() macro collisions. Use parenthesization: (std::max)(...), (std::min)(...), (std::numeric_limits<int>::max)(). PHASE-06/07/08 all hit this.

Lines 914-1110: runHostedExecutable is the canonical 7-step process-execution reference. Concurrent drain threads under RAII scope guards, WaitForSingleObject with 5min timeout, TerminateJobObject on timeout, join, GetExitCodeProcess, cleanup. Reference for any new sync process invocation.

src/MasterControlBootstrapper/main.cpp.note: Lines 644 and 707: WaitForSingleObject(..., INFINITE) without timeout/kill/drain. Pre-existing, tagged with `// PHASE-10 known-issue` source comments. FORBIDDEN-CONTRACT §6.4 documents the exemption. Rewrite is deferred work.

tests/MasterControlOrchestrationServerTe.note: Tests must be wired into main() near the bottom of the file. Each phase appended its tests to the ok &= chain, grouped by phase comment. 56 test functions as of PHASE-10.

include/MasterControl/MasterControlModel.note: ManagedEndpointPool's `template_` C++ field maps to `template` JSON key via explicit to_json/from_json. ClientHeartbeat metric fields default to -1.0 (unavailable sentinel). HostTelemetrySnapshot uses 0.0 (genuine idle, PDH-direct).

.github/workflows/windows-build-test-pac.note: DO NOT add workflow_dispatch. The gate is push/pull_request only. Concurrency cancels racing same-SHA runs. Version-stamp step must precede configure (FORBIDDEN-CONTRACT §6.5 enforces ordering).

.github/workflows/release.yml.note: DO NOT add workflow_dispatch. Tag-only trigger. Verifies same-SHA windows-build-test-package run via gh api before publishing. The file name is load-bearing — the release workflow's API query depends on it.

scripts/check-mastercontrol-forsetti.ps1.note: PHASE-05 retired 6 stale assertions about resources/web/app.js's pre-ADR-001 Forsetti bootstrap. Current rules: surface*Host elements present in index.html, no telemetryGrid/endpointTable IDs, no provider-era surfaces, no hardcoded CLU bootstrap.

VERSION.json.note: Single source of truth for product version. Bump only in PHASE-10 (already done: 0.5.0 -> 0.6.0). Sync-RepositoryVersionBadges.ps1 propagates to vcpkg.json + README badges.

resources/web/app.js.note: Honesty rule: every render of ClientHeartbeat / WorkerTelemetry metrics must go through formatMetric(). Direct .toFixed(...)+'%' is allowed only on HostTelemetrySnapshot (PDH-direct). FORBIDDEN-CONTRACT §8.1 enforces.

docs/wiki/Architecture-Decisions/ADR-003.note: Formal decision: keep MCPJungle for v0.6.x. Five triggers in this ADR activate a future PHASE-12 (native HTTP.sys gateway). Cite this ADR before any gateway-substrate discussion.
